bead.title: Create concepts/run-architecture page; retire execute-loop/execute-bead from primary copy
bead.description: Create website/content/docs/concepts/run-architecture.md describing 'ddx run' (single agent invocation), 'ddx try' (bead attempt in worktree), 'ddx work' (queue drain) as one unified architecture per FEAT-010. Update website/content/docs/concepts/architecture.md and homepage hero copy to use this naming. Retain execute-loop / execute-bead in CLI reference only.
bead.acceptance: 1. website/content/docs/concepts/run-architecture.md exists, explains the three layers, references FEAT-010. 2. concepts/architecture.md uses ddx run/try/work primary names; execute-loop/execute-bead removed from primary text (still allowed in CLI ref pages). 3. Homepage references the three-layer model. 4. 'rg -n "execute-loop|execute-bead" website/content/docs/concepts/ website/content/_index.md website/layouts/index.html' returns no matches in primary copy (excludes cli/commands/).
